description_long: This sconce features a long, rectangular body with a slightly tapered profile, constructed primarily from a smooth, light-colored material. The fixture houses two parallel fluorescent tubes, each secured at both ends by visible mounting brackets. The surface is clean and unadorned, emphasizing a utilitarian and functional design. The ends of the sconce are capped, and the mounting hardware is subtly integrated into the structure. The overall appearance is streamlined, with no visible decorative elements or embellishments. This type of sconce is commonly used in urban environments such as parking garages, hallways, or exterior building walls for efficient, widespread illumination.
description: A long, rectangular, light-colored sconce with two parallel fluorescent tubes and a minimalist, utilitarian design. The fixture is smooth and unadorned, emphasizing function over decoration.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the tapered profile and the two parallel fluorescent tubes set into the body.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the sconce, with both fluorescent tubes and their mounting brackets clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view, mirroring view 0, again highlighting the tapered profile and tube arrangement.
description_view_3: Side view identical to view 1, showing the length and parallel tube configuration.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a minimalist, utilitarian design with clean lines and no decorative elements, suitable for modern or industrial urban environments.
